class.name: ResonanceAmbisonicInternalStream
class.brief_description: Higher-order Ambisonics audio stream for ResonanceAmbisonicPlayer.
class.description: AudioStream resource that supplies multi-channel Ambisonics data. Supports first-order (4 channels), second-order (9 channels), and third-order (16 channels) Ambisonics. Set [member ambisonic_order] first; [member channel_streams] is resized to [code](order+1)²[/code] slots (4, 9, or 16) so the inspector matches the active order. Assign one [AudioStream] per Ambisonic channel in ACN order with SN3D normalization: 0=W, 1=Y, 2=Z, 3=X, 4=V, 5=T, 6=R, 7=S, 8=U, 9=K, 10=L, 11=M, 12=N, 13=O, 14=P, 15=Q.

members.member: Ambisonic order: 1st (4 channels), 2nd (9), or 3rd (16). Drives how many [member channel_streams] entries are used; lowering order truncates extra channels.

Array of [AudioStream] resources, one per Ambisonic channel. Length is kept equal to [code](ambisonic_order+1)²[/code] after load and when order changes. Order: ACN/SN3D (W,Y,Z,X,V,T,R,S,U,K,L,M,N,O,P,Q).
